title: Tough As Nails Addon
description: Add additional features to the original Tough As Nalis mod
body:
Really light add-on that add QoL changes to Tough As Nails.

As of right now, the addon has:
- Terralith, Incendium & Stellarity's biomes compatability. (Auto disable if you don't have them)
- Remove knockback from hyperthermia and thirst damage.
- Made custom armors like wool and leaf armor enchantable.
- Fixed a crash with Water Cleansing.
- Reduce performance impact from thermometer significantly.
- Made netherite canteen fireproof (idk why this wasn't added in the first place)
- Made vanilla food (and some Stellarity food) give thirst / hydration. (This implementation was heavily inspiried by [Tough As Nails - Vanilla Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tough-as-nails-vanilla-pack) by [n643064](https://github.com/n643064)
